title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Big Bazaar Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Big Bazaar Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Big Bazaar Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Visual Merchandiser at our Nashik location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Big Bazaar Ventures Solutions:
Big Bazaar Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Big Bazaar Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
